brief_html: This message was used to check a digest of a game file. This message is no longer used; developers should use the SID_CHECKDATAFILE2 message.
remarks_html:
This message was used to check a digest of a game file. This message is no longer used; developers should use the SID_CHECKDATAFILE2 message.

The digest is created by using the broken SHA-1 hash on the first 64-bytes of the (filesize % 64) times. This due to a bug in the client.
